overall.description: A cinematic slow push-in through a grand Gothic dining hall reminiscent of a wizarding school, featuring floating candles, long wooden house tables filled with students, and warm golden sunlight streaming through tall stained-glass windows. The footage is rendered in a high-fidelity game engine with realistic lighting and materials.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly through a magnificent Gothic dining hall filled with floating candles and long wooden tables where people are seated. Warm golden light streams through tall stained-glass windows at the far end, illuminating the stone architecture and marble floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous slow push-in through a grand Gothic dining hall that gradually reveals the intricate details of its architecture and inhabitants. It begins by gliding through the vast space, passing beneath floating candles and alongside long wooden tables where people are seated under the glow of warm golden light streaming from distant stained-glass windows. As the camera advances, a student in dark robes enters from the left foreground and crosses the central aisle, adding a sense of life to the stone and marble environment. The scene then tightens as the wooden tables draw closer on both sides, while the stained-glass windows at the far end expand in the frame to reveal their full, detailed brilliance.
